side_effects.description: Initial cycle: body hives and joint inflammation at injection site
Small welts at injection site during second cycle (3 months, 3-5x/week)

Anaphylactic shock: intense oral/mouth pressure, neck lymph inflammation within 1 minute, full body inflammation, lightheadedness by minute 2, loss of consciousness, vomiting, gastrointestinal distress, severe body pain, multiple episodes of unconsciousness

protocol_notes: 0.05ml of 5mg/5mg CJC/IPA vial diluted with 3ml BAC water. Dose of 83mcg calculated from this dilution ratio. First cycle ~5 months with break. Second cycle 3 months at 3-5x/week with gradual dose titration. Injected before bed. Anaphylactic episode occurred after approximately 2 years total on-and-off use with progressive tolerance development and eventual sudden severe reaction.
